We are building the next generation of AI-powered developer tools.

Requirements:
- Experience with LLMs, MCP, and agent-based workflow systems
- Strong Python and TypeScript skills
- Familiarity with automation and retrieval systems (RAG, embeddings)
- Developer tooling experience: CLIs, IDE extensions, or SDK design
- Machine learning or NLP background is a plus

Our stack includes Claude, vector databases, and serverless infrastructure.
We are a fast-growing startup. You will own your projects end-to-end in an autonomous environment.

Full-time, fully remote.
